title: Revert logo to saved Deeds logo in Header and LoginPrompt

requirements.text: In the Header component (frontend/src/components/Header.tsx), replace the current logo image rendered inside the header button (XPath: /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/header[1]/div[1]/button[1]/img[1]) with the original saved Deeds logo asset at 'frontend/public/assets/generated/deeds-logo.png'. Ensure the img src points to '/assets/generated/deeds-logo.png'.

quotes: go back to the logo i told you to save for me

acceptanceCriteria: The header logo img src is set to '/assets/generated/deeds-logo.png'
The original Deeds logo is visible in the top navigation header
No broken image or placeholder is displayed in the header

requirements.text: In the main page/hero section (XPath: /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/div[1]/div[1]/img[1]), replace the current logo image with the original saved Deeds logo asset at 'frontend/public/assets/generated/deeds-logo.png'. Ensure the img src points to '/assets/generated/deeds-logo.png'. This likely corresponds to the Gate or LoginPrompt component hero logo.

quotes: go back to the logo i told you to save for me

acceptanceCriteria: The main/hero section logo img src is set to '/assets/generated/deeds-logo.png'
The original Deeds logo is visible in the hero/main area of the page
No broken image or placeholder is displayed in the main content logo area

constraints: Do not modify any other images or assets beyond the two logo img elements identified by the provided XPaths
Use only the existing saved logo asset at '/assets/generated/deeds-logo.png' — do not generate a new logo image
nonGoals: Redesigning the logo or creating a new logo image
Changing any other UI elements beyond the two logo images
